responsibilities: Perform structural analysis and design of steel and reinforced concrete buildings using ETABS and SAP2000 software
Develop structural calculations and construction drawings to ensure compliance with building codes and seismic requirements
Conduct finite element analysis to evaluate structural behavior under gravity, wind, and seismic loading conditions
Collaborate with architects and MEP engineers to integrate structural systems into overall building design
Review shop drawings and submittals to verify compliance with structural design intent and specifications
Conduct field inspections and structural assessments to evaluate existing building conditions for retrofit projects
Prepare technical reports and design narratives to support permit submissions and peer review processes
Coordinate with contractors to resolve structural design issues and ensure constructability during project execution
